name: Fresh Okra Muffins
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Thinly sliced fresh okra (about 1/2 pound)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first three ingredients in a medium bowl and make a well in the center of the mixture.
2. In a separate bowl, combine milk with eggs, vegetable oil, Worchestershire sauce, and hot sauce.
3. Add the liquid mixture to the dry ingredients, stirring just until moistened.
4. Fold in the okra and onion.
5. Grease muffin pans and preheat the oven to 400°F (200°C).
6. Quickly spoon the batter into the prepared pans, filling them about two-thirds full.
7. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for 20 minutes or until lightly browned.
8. Remove the muffins from the pans immediately.
Yield: 1-1/2 dozen
